attributes.action: Hold legally responsible those who visited the Rape Academy Website
attributes.additional_details: This site has revealed MILLIONS of men sharing tips to others about how to drug and rape their wives/girlfriends at home & without being caught . Our legal system rarely prosecutes sex offenders - but this is NECESSARY. You have a right to protect the women and girls who are being sexually assaulted without their knowledge and revealing their partners who are a THREAT to their safety. If you do not track down these men and hold them accountable you will be letting this rape continue in UK homes.
attributes.background: For the safety and protection of women and girls throughout the UK - men who have visited the Rape Academy Website (of which 60+ million visits a month occur worldwide) should be tracked down from their IP address and their name and location made publicly available OR legally held accountable

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

Decisions about criminal investigations and prosecutions are a matter for the police and Crown Prosecution Service, not the UK Government or Parliament.
